title: Punjabi House
desc: A fisherman rescues a debt-ridden man from suicide, only to use him to pay his debts off.

title: Ayal Kadha Ezhuthukayanu
desc: Two friends are framed by Priyadarshini, a vengeful woman, who accuses them of rape.

title: Ponman
desc: Ajesh lends gold for a wedding, unaware the groom plots to steal it and end his life.

title: Ennum Eppozhum
desc: The life of a lazy magazine reporter takes a turn after he is asked to interview a lawyer.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
desc: Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat Bhallaladeva for killing his father.

title: Salaar
desc: As the Khansaar prince's throne faces a threat, a man arrives to help him reclaim power.

title: Moonnu Masangalkku Munpu
desc: Dr. Rajasekharan is ready to go to great lengths just to make his sister happy.

title: Irul
desc: A couple takes shelter at a house, whose owner behaves in a suspicious manner.

title: Ammayane Sathyam
desc: When Parvathi's family is murdered, she is forced to disguise herself as a boy.

title: Sunday Holiday
desc: Unni meets a director to narrate his story about a man who plans to start life afresh.

title: Yodha
desc: A man is on a mission to save a Buddhist monk from black magic practitioners.

title: Thanneermathan Dinangal
desc: Jaison, a teenager, gets in trouble with Ravi, the new teacher who is liked by everyone.

title: Kantara
desc: A young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to save his people.

title: Prince and Family
desc: When a man marries a woman who is his polar opposite, it leads to chaos.

title: Memories
desc: A police officer must probe into a murder case where the culprit follows a pattern.

title: Sainyam
desc: Eashwar and Zakir get engaged in a project. Some terrorists try to steal secrets.

title: Kayyoppu
desc: The story of Balachandran, who works as an accountant in a fertiliser company in Kochi and lives immersed in the world of books.

title: Rajathanthram
desc: Carpenter Premachandran saves abused maid Kanmani and shelters her. To hide from her tormentors, she disguises herself as a boy and joins his carpentry team.

title: Dubai
desc: Ravi, who was framed in a murder, moves to Dubai and turns into a powerful tycoon. His success earns him many rivals and encounters with criminals.
